title: Quik.day
description: Governed command console for email, calendar, tasks, and social. Plan & Diff → Approve → Undo. Kill tab-switching. Ship work.

title: TaleLingo
description: Story-based language learning app for Vietnamese speakers learning German. Read short stories, listen to audio, tap words for contextual meanings, practice grammar, and review saved vocabulary with spaced repetition.

title: JobPiloteer

title: Quill Social
description: AI Assistant for Managing Unlimited Campaigns Across All Social Media Platforms

title: Vendex.io
description: Vendex's software, featuring a fully customizable workflow and robust API ecosystem, seamlessly integrates with any IoT device and enterprise software, elevating your customer interactions to new standards.

title: Forma
description: No-code platform that aims to empower non-technical individuals to build dynamic & customised workflows for any business process.
